72 Rectification of Birth Time
assuring it to be 6.00 A.M. If the local time of sunrise is before
or after 6.00 A.M. deduct or add the difference as the case may
be. Dr. Satyanarayana Rao's tables start from 6.3 A.M. This is
not acceptable.
When we give 6.00 A.M. it means from the beginning of
6.00 A.M. to the end of 6.2 A.M. The three minutes are to be
distributed among the three constellations. The signs refer to
the Niryana Zodiac.
As we said earlier, we cannot give Akasha, Tejas and
Prithivi to male births entirely. As the Panchikarana doctrine
clearly states, the elements other than Akasha are constituted
in a. peculiar manner. Each has half of its owu nature, the
other half being filled by the proceeding tattvas.
Prithivi being ruled by Mercury can give male or female
births. The second half of Jala (6 minutes) and the second half
ofVayu (12 minutes) do give rise to male births. The second
